positive: A stylized, minimalist graphic representation of a nebula taking form within a crystalline geometric container. The central subject is a cosmic core, rendered as swirling sapphire and deep violet gas clouds, sharply contrasted against angular, glowing cyan and burnt orange crystal facets. The composition is perfectly centered, utilizing strong negative space and clear silhouettes. Style should be a fusion of Art Deco geometry and bioluminescence. Lighting is dramatic, emanating from within the crystal structure, creating hard-edged shadows and highlights. The overall color palette is cool and rich, with metallic accents. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Highly detailed, vector art quality, flat graphic design aesthetic.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, low detail, grainy, text, logo, watermark, amateur, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, photorealistic
